text: The public hearing on the rural school consolidation proposal is scheduled for Nov 12 at the Cody High School auditorium. All Park County residents are welcome.
The board meeting agenda and the consolidation enrollment impact report are now posted under Materials.
A recording of the town hall on district consolidation is now available for those who could not attend.
The public comment period on the consolidation plan has been extended through mid-November. Written input may be submitted using the community input form.
